title: batatas insignis
intro: Batatas insignis, also known as the small-eyed batata, is a species of flowering plant in the yam family, Dioscoreaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Batatas insignis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers can be boiled, roasted, or dried to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
